name: monday-mcp
description: monday.com plugin marketplace for AI coding assistants. Hosts the monday MCP server and Claude Code plugins built on top of it. First plugin: monday-crm — five skills for monday CRM users (daily briefing, forecast, meeting-to-deal, workspace builder, data cleanup).

plugins.name: monday-crm
plugins.description: Run your sales pipeline in monday CRM from plain language. Start the day with a ranked deal briefing, build a forecast, turn meeting notes into deal updates, set up a CRM workspace from scratch, and keep your data clean — every result written straight back into monday as a real board, dashboard, or doc. Built on the official monday MCP connector.
